// note: Canonical MCP server definitions. ai.sh registers filesystem, github, and context7 with the Claude CLI via `claude mcp add-json`. composio is registered only when COMPOSIO_API_KEY is set (it's heavy — 300+ connectors — so keep it off unless a task needs it). Keep the active MCP set lean: each heavy server costs 2k–10k context tokens; toggle with `/mcp`. Secrets come from env (~/.env), never inline.

context7.// note: Up-to-date, version-correct library docs into context. Low overhead. CONTEXT7_API_KEY is optional (raises rate limits).

composio.// note: Opt-in: 300+ SaaS/API connectors. Heavy on context tokens — registered by ai.sh only when COMPOSIO_API_KEY is set. Verify the start command against the current composio CLI.
